notes: SCENARIO_COEXEC uses a static per-level scheduler. The default ratio policy weights the chunk split with projected CPU@250 MHz vs CGRA@100 MHz single-hash throughput, even when the measured RTL run still uses 100/100.

Alias of TotalCC for paper tables that use CC without the suffix.
Accelerator active cycles exported as max_col(active). In this RTL, the active counter already covers the full non-parked residency of the column, including stall periods.

First-order projection to MetricMerkleProjCpuClockMHz / MetricMerkleProjCgraClockMHz MHz. CPU-active time is frequency-scaled, the measured non-CPU wall-time residue is preserved, and the result is clipped to the CGRA active-time bound. Use as an estimate, not as a measured dual-clock result.
